ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event was held */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Type of event (e.g., lecture, workshop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or organization responsible for the event */,
  "external_data_source" TEXT /* Identifier for the external data source, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related event */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the attendees (M/F) */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total number of attendees for that gender */,
  "present_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees present for that gender */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the attendees (e.g., 18-25) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the attendees */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total attendance that was present */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Identifier for the data source (e.g., manual entry, external system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES demographics ("gender")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the event */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., lecture, workshop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* A broader category for the event type (e.g., academic, social) */,
  "default_duration" INTEGER /* Default duration of events of this type in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "building" TEXT /* Building where the location is situated */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor number of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender identifier (e.g., M or F) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the demographic (e.g., 18-25) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the demographic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
